Board configuration structures, macros, and definitions for STM32F7, Robert board versions, and display settings.


## Files
- **[board.h](board.h.md)**: Defines board configuration structures and macros for handling GPIO and IRQ mappings on STM32F7.
- **[board_definitions.h](board_definitions.h.md)**: Board-specific header file selection for different Robert board versions.
- **[board_robert_bb.c](board_robert_bb.c.md)**: Configures the iCE40LP device and I2C bus for the Robert platform in the Pebble firmware.
- **[board_robert_bb.h](board_robert_bb.h.md)**: Board definitions and configurations for Robert BB (C2 Bigboard) including buttons, power, and flash.
- **[board_robert_evt.c](board_robert_evt.c.md)**: Configuration and initialization of iCE40LP and I2C devices for the Robert platform.
- **[board_robert_evt.h](board_robert_evt.h.md)**: Board definitions and configurations for Robert EVT, including button, power, flash, and accessory settings.
- **[display.h](display.h.md)**: Defines display parameters and orientation constants for the Pebble firmware.
